## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Affected user journeys

- [ ] New or existing user access
- [ ] Core product action
- [ ] Error recovery
- [ ] Permissions/security boundary
- [ ] Billing/payment, if applicable
- [ ] Infrastructure/deployment, if applicable
- [ ] Other:

## Verification evidence

List commands run and results. Do not claim checks passed unless they were actually run.

- [ ] Lint/typecheck:
- [ ] Unit tests:
- [ ] Integration tests:
- [ ] E2E tests:
- [ ] Terraform plan/validate, if relevant:
- [ ] Manual/exploratory, if relevant:

## Agent review evidence

- [ ] Planner review
- [ ] Builder notes
- [ ] Backend/API/data review
- [ ] Frontend/UX review
- [ ] Security/privacy review
- [ ] Infra/cost review
- [ ] E2E/test coverage review
- [ ] Docs/release review

## Security, data, infra, and cost impact

Explain any impact or state `No material impact`.

## Docs updated

- [ ] Product docs
- [ ] Architecture docs
- [ ] Engineering standards
- [ ] Runbooks
- [ ] Not needed because:

## Rollback plan

Describe how to roll back safely.
